channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 7%.

item.title: BBC Politics: Wes Streeting: Ambitious minister at centre of leadership speculation
item.description: Wes Streeting: Ambitious minister at centre of leadership speculation

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting’s allies say he’s preparing to resign and launch leadership challenge as early as tomorrow – UK politics live
item.description: Streeting’s allies say he’s preparing to resign and launch leadership challenge as early as tomorrow – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting-Starmer latest: Health minister ‘set to resign’ and spark leadership contest after King’s Speech
item.description: Streeting-Starmer latest: Health minister ‘set to resign’ and spark leadership contest after King’s Speech

item.title:
Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: The Labour leadership contest should be a big, meaningful debate about ideas, not a madcap knife fight followed by a coronation
inews.co.uk/opinion/wes-...
item.description:
The Labour leadership contest should be a big, meaningful debate about ideas, not a madcap knife fight followed by a coronation
inews.co.uk/opinion/wes-...

item.title: BBC Politics: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis
item.description: At a glance: Starmer grapples with leadership crisis

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): What is the king’s speech and what is the state opening of parliament?
item.description: What is the king’s speech and what is the state opening of parliament?

item.title: Bluesky · @pippacrerar.bsky.social: 💥 We're also hearing that Wes Streeting is preparing to quit as health secretary and could mount formal challenge for leadership as early as tomorrow - as per @breeallegretti.bsky.social & @patrickmaguire.bsky.social...
item.description: 💥 We're also hearing that Wes Streeting is preparing to quit as health secretary and could mount formal challenge for leadership as early as tomorrow - as per @breeallegretti.bsky.social & @patrickmaguire.bsky.social...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’ address amid Starmer leadership crisis
item.description: King’s Speech 2026: Key points from Charles’ address amid Starmer leadership crisis

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work
item.description: Why Labour’s anti-Burnham argument doesn’t work

item.title: FT UK Politics: Downing Street braced for Streeting leadership challenge
item.description: Downing Street braced for Streeting leadership challenge
